text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hello, El. And thank you. ♪ ...But what happened
to that plan of yours?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Didn't Sei come up with it some time ago? If I
recall, you were to celebrate my birthday by
taking off your mask for the whole day.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Eek! I'm not listening! Uh, I mean, it's just... It's a
little too embarrassing, y'know?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...I'll come clean! Actually, I've come here today in this mask because it's your birthday!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Grass, I know that only the fiercest of
conflicts can get you excited, fired up—going all
out! Tell me I'm wrong!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why El, the world's strongest racer, will be
celebrating your birthday still masked as the
world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's just like you. I see you've gotten
better at masking your feelings.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Well, y'see, even if I really did take off my
mask...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'd still wanna tell you the same thing. Happy
birthday, Grass!
